summary: ScreenOdds has a starter movie-chart sentiment snapshot. A live scan should refresh social discussion around 2026 box office leaders, Netflix/movie-chart Kalshi series, and Polymarket highest-grossing movie markets.
topNarratives: Highest-grossing movie sentiment should be checked against release calendars and franchise comps.
Social buzz can flag attention spikes, but verified grosses determine durable movement.
Kalshi movie-chart series can add comparison-market context even without affiliate links.
